question_text: For a given data (xi, yi), i = 1, 2, . . . , n, with Pn i=1 x2 i > 0, let ˆβ satisfy i=1 (yi −ˆβxi)2 = inf β∈R i=1 (yi −βxi)2. Further, let vj = yj −xj and uj = 2xj, for j = 1, 2, . . . , n, and let ˆγ satisfy i=1 (vi −ˆγui)2 = inf γ∈R i=1 (vi −γui)2. If ˆβ = 10, then the value of ˆγ is:
solution:
The given problem involves two optimization problems for minimizing the sum of
squared errors.
